proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; LINE: 97
; PROVE: result=0 (non-vacuous) implies transitionCount > 0.
; The return is a strict biconditional of transitionCount === 0.
(declare-const num_declares Int)
(declare-const num_asserts Int)
(declare-const transition_count Int)
(declare-const result Int)
(assert (> num_declares 0))
(assert (> num_asserts 0))
(assert (>= transition_count 0))
; Code: return (transitionCount === 0)
(assert (=> (= transition_count 0) (= result 1)))
(assert (=> (> transition_count 0) (= result 0)))
; Negate: result=0 (returns false) but transitionCount=0
(assert (= result 0))
(assert (= transition_count 0))
(check-sat)
